mapper.insert: INSERT INTO hm_query.order_details_flat ( id, tenant, last_synced_at, order_id, order_number, order_date, order_status, flow_id, total_amount, subtotal, tax_amount, shipping_amount, discount_amount, item_count, currency, coupon_codes, first_product_name, first_product_sku, total_items, customer_id, customer_name, customer_email, customer_phone, customer_tier, seller_id, seller_name, seller_tier, payment_id, payment_method, payment_status, gateway_name, gateway_fee, shipment_id, carrier, tracking_number, shipped_at, estimated_delivery_date, actual_delivery_date, shipping_city, shipping_state, shipping_pincode, sla_status, sla_breach_hours, commission_amount, commission_rate, seller_payout ) SELECT o.id, o.tenant, NOW(), o.id, o.order_number, o.created_time, o.state_id, o.flow_id, o.total_amount, o.subtotal, o.tax_amount, o.shipping_amount, o.discount_amount, COALESCE(o.item_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hm_order.order_items oi2 WHERE oi2.order_id = o.id)), o.currency, o.coupon_codes, -- First product (from order_items LATERAL) oi.product_name, oi.sku, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hm_order.order_items oi3 WHERE oi3.order_id = o.id), -- Customer o.customer_id, COALESCE(u.first_name || ' ' || COALESCE(u.last_name, ''), ''), u.email, u.phone, u.customer_tier, -- Seller (from first order item) oi.supplier_id, COALESCE(s.business_name, oi.supplier_name), s.tier, -- Payment pay.id, pay.payment_method, pay.state_id, pay.gateway_name, pay.gateway_fee, -- Shipment ship.id, COALESCE(o.carrier, ship.carrier), COALESCE(o.tracking_number, ship.tracking_number), ship.shipped_at, COALESCE(o.estimated_delivery_date, ship.estimated_delivery_date), COALESCE(o.actual_delivery_date, ship.actual_delivery_date), -- Address (from order_addresses or parsed from shipping_address) oa.city, oa.state, oa.postal_code, -- SLA CASE WHEN o.state_id IN ('DELIVERED', 'CANCELLED') THEN 'COMPLETED' WHEN o.sla_late > 0 THEN 'BREACHED' WHEN o.sla_tending_late > 0 THEN 'AT_RISK' ELSE 'ON_TRACK' END, COALESCE(o.sla_late, 0), -- Commission (computed: total_amount * commission_rate) COALESCE((o.total_amount * COALESCE(s.commission_rate, 500) / 10000)::BIGINT, 0), COALESCE(s.commission_rate, 500), COALESCE(o.total_amount - (o.total_amount * COALESCE(s.commission_rate, 500) / 10000)::BIGINT, o.total_amount) FROM hm_order.orders o LEFT JOIN hm_user.user_profiles u ON o.customer_id = u.id LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT supplier_id, supplier_name, product_name, sku FROM hm_order.order_items WHERE order_id = o.id LIMIT 1 ) oi ON true LEFT JOIN hm_supplier.supplier s ON oi.supplier_id = s.id LEFT JOIN hm_payment.payment pay ON o.payment_id = pay.id LEFT JOIN hm_shipping.shipments ship ON ship.order_id = o.id LEFT JOIN hm_order.order_addresses oa ON oa.order_id = o.id AND oa.address_type = 'SHIPPING'

INSERT INTO hm_query.order_items_flat ( id, tenant, last_synced_at, order_id, product_id, product_name, sku, quantity, unit_price, total_price, tax_amount, discount_amount, supplier_id, supplier_name, image_url, hsn_code, return_eligible, fulfillment_status ) SELECT oi.id, o.tenant, NOW(), oi.order_id, oi.product_id, oi.product_name, oi.sku, oi.quantity, oi.unit_price, oi.total_price, oi.tax_amount, oi.discount_amount, oi.supplier_id, oi.supplier_name, oi.image_url, oi.hsn_code, oi.return_eligible, oi.fulfillment_status FROM hm_order.order_items oi JOIN hm_order.orders o ON oi.order_id = o.id

INSERT INTO hm_query.order_activity_flat ( id, tenant, order_id, action, description, performed_by, created_time ) SELECT oa.id, o.tenant, oa.order_id, oa.action, oa.description, oa.performed_by, oa.created_time FROM hm_order.order_activity oa JOIN hm_order.orders o ON oa.order_id = o.id WHERE oa.created_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '90 days'

INSERT INTO hm_query.shipment_tracking_flat ( id, tenant, order_id, shipment_id, event_type, location, description, event_time ) SELECT ste.id, s.tenant, s.order_id, ste.shipment_id, ste.event_type, ste.location, ste.description, ste.event_time FROM hm_shipping.shipping_tracking_events ste JOIN hm_shipping.shipments s ON ste.shipment_id = s.id WHERE ste.event_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '90 days'

INSERT INTO hm_query.order_risk_flat ( id, tenant, order_id, risk_score, risk_level, payment_risk, address_verified, assessment_status, assessed_at ) SELECT fa.id, fa.tenant, fa.entity_id, COALESCE(fa.risk_score, 0), COALESCE(fa.risk_level, 'LOW'), CASE WHEN fa.risk_score < 30 THEN 'LOW' WHEN fa.risk_score < 70 THEN 'MEDIUM' ELSE 'HIGH' END, true, fa.state_id, fa.created_time FROM hm_fraud.fraud_assessments fa WHERE fa.entity_type = 'ORDER'
